routing_flag: CAUTION: GT recently helped SEC drop a securities fraud case (Feb 2026). Firm works defense side too. Reframe outreach around post-judgment enforcement/asset recovery — avoid 'securities fraud' framing.

outreach_draft.subject: Post-Judgment Asset Recovery — Offshore Entity — Gatekeeper Enforcement Strategy
outreach_draft.body:
Dear Mr. Jeruchimowitz,

I am reaching out regarding a post-judgment enforcement matter that aligns with your expertise in asset recovery, veil piercing, and fraudulent transfer litigation.

Our client holds an uncollected fraud judgment against an offshore foreign corporation. The judgment debtor has no reachable assets. The enforcement strategy focuses on gatekeeper liability — pursuing the auditors, professional advisors, and financial institutions whose conduct enabled the underlying fraud — using identified exposure as settlement leverage rather than extending litigation against the debtor.

Your recognized practice in post-judgment proceedings, alter ego claims, and international asset recovery (Who's Who Legal — Asset Recovery) reflects direct alignment with the enforcement mechanics this matter requires.

I would welcome a brief preliminary call to explore fit. No commitment implied. Case details available upon request.

Sincerely,

Corporate X-Factor Operations
Judgment Monetization Group
corporatezfactor.com
